Part 1: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH1

Defeat 1 Lieutenant Xhaveris lvl 84

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Warp Gate in Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 1 Lieutenant Xhaveris lvl 84.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 2.

Description

Operative Smith: “We have been working hard to identify the key links in the enemy chain of command. Now we need someone with *special* skills to eliminate these targets. A large bounty awaits for the one who manage to *eliminate* the designated target.

The first target is Lieutenant Xhaveris. He was last spotted commanding the defence near the entrance of the first circle. He commands a Nexar Tank class ship. Be careful not to end up facing the wrong side of a Tank class ship, it’s armed with an extremely deadly short range gatling gun. It’s weaknesses is its’ weak navigational capability.”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Excellent work captain, your skills never stops amazing me. Ready for more work?”

Part 2: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH2

Defeat 1 Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis lvl 85

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis lvl 85.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 3.

Description

Operative Smith: “The second target is Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis. He was last spotted patrolling the first circle. He likes to command his troops from the back line, while sniping his enemies with deadly accuracy. Lieutenant Commander Gerhavis pilots a Nexar Projector class ship. The Nexar Projector is weak in close combat, they always tries stay at range and specialized for long range combat. A hefty bounty awaits whoever can bring me his head!”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Again… excellent work. Those sniper types are not so thought when it gets close and personal, right?

Part 3: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH3

Defeat 1 Commander Zherghur lvl 88

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Commander Zherghur lvl 88.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 4.

Description

Operative Smith: “The next target is Commander Zherghur. This is going to be more difficult, Commander Zherghur pilots a Nexar Blade type of ship. The Nexar Blade is fast and well armoured, it’s very strong in close combat. Commander Zherghur was last seen organizing the defence of the second circle.”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Well done captain! Read for something a bit more troublesome?”

Part 4: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH4

Defeat 1 Captain Xhargrefh lvl 120

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Captain Xhargrefh lvl 120.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 5.

Description

Operative Smith: “The next mark is Captain Xhargrefh. This is going to be a lot more difficult. Captain Xhargref pilots an Elite Class Phaser vessel. The phaser is capable of completely negating energy resistances with it’s powerful Phaser beam weapon. The mark seems to prefer hit and run type of attacks. You might want to clear out any back up in the area before engaging this target. Captain Xhargrefh was last observed commanding the defences at the entrance to the third circle.”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Unbelievable! You definitely earned the reward!”

Part 5: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH5

Defeat 1 Commodore Herivis lvl 122

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Commodore Herivis lvl 122.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 6.

Description

Operative Smith: “The next link in their chain of command is Commodore Herivis. He is in a Nexar Edge class ship. He managed to take out the whole scouting squadron with a single shot. It appears as if they finally have managed to mount of version of the Heavy Weave generator, the type that those nasty space station turrets are sporting, on a mobile vessel. The damage output of this craft is insane, whatever you do, do not get hit. Even if you use harden shields against it, your defences will be severely weakened for a long time. Herivis was last seen the entrance to the 4th circle.”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Amazing work there Captain!"

Part 6: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH6

Defeat 1 Rear Admiral Vorghis lvl 124

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Rear Admiral Vorghis lvl 124.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 7.

Description

Operative Smith: “My agents have just identified the next target; Rear Admiral Vorghis. He commands an upgraded version of the Nexar Blade vessel. Our scouts reports that Admiral Vorghis vessel have greatly improved harden shields, leaving only a few seconds during which the ship is vulnerable. Vorghis was last seen patrolling the 4th circle.

Completion

Operative Smith: “That’s great news Captain! Rear Admiral Vorghis is no more! This should severely disrupt their defensive capabilities. You have truly earned the bounty. Ready for next mark?“

Part 7: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH7

Defeat 1 Vice Admiral Ahrgeris lvl 126

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Vice Admiral Ahrgeris lvl 126.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 8.

Description

Operative Smith: “The next mark is Vice Admiral Ahrgeris. Ahrgeris is a rising star among the Nexar, he have the reputation of being the best pilot in their entire fleet. He pilots a Vindicator class ship, it’s strong, heavily armed and sports a teleporting device. Ahrgeris was last observed organizing the defences of the entrance to the 5th circle.”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Excellent work captain, this assassination business seems to suit you very well.”

Part 8: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 8

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardBH8

Defeat 1 Admiral Zhersis lvl 130

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Admiral Zhersis lvl 130.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 9.

Description

Operative Smith: “The next target is something completely different, if you choose to go after this one…. I don’t expect to see you again. The mark is Admiral Zhersis, so far we have no intel on this one. The agents that have been dispatched to investigate this target have all vanished without a trace. There is a huge reward waiting for anyone that can bring me Admiral Zhersis head.”

Find and kill Admiral Zhersis

Completion

Operative Smith: “Outstanding captain! To be fair I never expected to see you again. You keep exceeding our wildest expectations! You have really earned the reward this time!”

Part 9: Bounty Hunter Vorsran: Part 9

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeboss
Level range0
RewardBH9

Defeat Three Emperors in Vorsran

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat Three Emperors.

Description

Operative Smith: “We have managed to gather a lot more intel on the Nexar while you were gone. The Nexar are ruled by three Emperors. Apparently the Nexar value strength in battle as the main qualification for any position in their government. Every 4th year a competition is held, a battle royal until only three are left alive. These three are given the title of Emperor and are placed in charge of the empire for the next four years. Our agents reports that they await challenges from everyone in the middle of the 5ht circle. If you somehow could defeat them… maybe this war will finally end.”

Completion

Operative Smith: “Unbelievable! You did it! Finally we beat the Nexar!”

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
